The recovery score decline suggests your autonomic nervous system is struggling to maintain homeostasis, likely triggered by accumulated stress from prior days' activities.

analysis.vestibular_readiness: Current autonomic instability (HRV 35-56, readiness 77-89) suggests reduced capacity for intensive vestibular rehab. Scale back to basic gaze stabilization only on days with HRV <50 or readiness <80.
analysis.focus_for_next_week: Prioritize deep sleep recovery through strict sleep hygiene - earlier bedtime, magnesium glycinate 2 hours before bed, and limit activity on days following HRV drops >20% to prevent autonomic crashes.
